goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have 'a star of 3' and should 'include free parking'.
The hotel should be in the 'west'.
Make sure you get 'hotel type' and 'address'.
You are also looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should be 'in the same area as the hotel' and should serve 'international' food.
The restaurant should be in the 'expensive' price range.
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves 'thai' food.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'postcode'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to leave the 'restaurant' by '04:45'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have a star of 3 and should include free parking
The hotel should be in the west
Make sure you get hotel type and address
You are also looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the same area as the hotel and should serve international food
The restaurant should be in the expensive price range
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves thai food
Make sure you get address and postcode
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to leave the restaurant by 04:45
Make sure you get contact number and car type
